title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: Login error message is displayed via Angular interpolation in the login template.
coverage_items: LoginViewActive--loginError/Bind login error message via Angular interpolation in login template-->LoginViewActive

title: EP - Normal email error reflection via Angular interpolation
precondition: User is on login page; account for user@example.com does not exist or login will fail
test_steps:
Navigate to the login page
Enter email 'user@example.com'
Enter any password (e.g., 'password')
Submit the login form
Observe the error message displayed on the page
expected_result: Error message is displayed and contains 'user@example.com' as literal text. No JavaScript dialog appears, and the HTML is rendered as plain text (Angular interpolation safely binds the content).

title: DT - Email without XSS payload: safe interpolation
precondition: User is on login page; login will fail for the given email
test_steps:
Navigate to the login page
Enter a normal email that will cause an error (e.g., 'test@example.com')
Enter a password
Submit the form
Verify the error message
expected_result: Error message displays the email as plain text; no script execution. Angular interpolation correctly binds the content.
